meta.name: Justin Harmon Professional Library
meta.description: Comprehensive library of professional achievements, projects, skills, and innovations
meta.source: Compiled from ARCHV folder and resume variants

hiring_manager_intelligence_tool.name: Hiring Manager Intelligence Tool
hiring_manager_intelligence_tool.description: Team building advisory tool that empowers hiring managers to translate team dynamics into actionable search criteria for HR
hiring_manager_intelligence_tool.problem_solved: Hiring managers consistently get poor candidate matches from HR because they lack tools to communicate team needs effectively
hiring_manager_intelligence_tool.core_innovation: Three-profile blueprint system that works within existing HR workflows
key_features: Team composition analysis using Big Five and Belbin frameworks
Gap identification and complementary trait mapping
HR translation engine for search criteria

three_profile_system.profile_a: Conventional Fit - Traditional path candidates with standard qualifications
three_profile_system.profile_b: Adjacent/Transferable Fit - Different industry candidates with transferable skills
three_profile_system.profile_c: High-Ceiling Wild Card - Unconventional backgrounds but key complementary traits

strategic_advantages: Promotes diversity through structured spectrum approach
Focuses on team gaps rather than just individual qualifications

market_validation.competitive_landscape: 100+ resume building platforms exist, but no tools target hiring managers for team composition analysis
market_validation.market_gap: Blue ocean opportunity - existing solutions are HR-centric or post-hire focused
market_validation.category_creation: Hiring Manager Intelligence Tools - democratizing strategic consulting capability

adoption_strategies: One-Click Team Snapshot - Upload LinkedIn profiles, get instant analysis
Fix My Last Bad Hire Entry Point

joju.name: Joju - Professional OS
joju.description: LinkedIn alternative with proof-based profiles and zero-configuration portfolio generation

target_segments.subtle_converts: Risk-averse job seekers who need conventional framing

core_features: PromptGen workflow (Parse → Select → Render → Validate → Export)

8825_pcms.name: 8825 PCMS (Persistent Context Memory Sidecar)
8825_pcms.description: LLM-agnostic portable knowledge system for maintaining consistent AI behavior across platforms
8825_pcms.core_innovation: Single JSON file contains all context for any LLM

product_launches: Multiple seasonal eyewear collections (Costa, Dragon, Native)
process_improvements: Developed zero-configuration portfolio generation system (<30 sec)
innovation: Developed portable AI context management (8825 PCMS)
leadership: Led design strategy for major eyewear brands
Mentored junior designers and product managers

education_and_certifications.note: To be extracted from resume documents

trustybits_project.name: Trustybits - Hiring Manager Intelligence Tool
trustybits_project.tagline: Team-chemistry-aware hiring guidance that works with existing HR processes
trustybits_project.core_concept: Empower hiring managers to translate team dynamics into actionable search criteria for HR, resulting in better candidate matches on the first attempt
trustybits_project.problem_statement: Hiring managers consistently get poor candidate matches from HR because they lack the tools and framework to communicate what they actually need for team success. They think in team dynamics but communicate in job description language, while HR thinks in qualifications but lacks team context.

solution_framework.approach: Team building advisory tool that analyzes current team composition and generates three-profile hiring blueprints

three_profile_system.profile_a_conventional: Traditional path candidates with standard qualifications (ATS-friendly)
three_profile_system.profile_b_transferable: Different industry candidates with transferable skills and proven adaptability
three_profile_system.profile_c_wildcard: Unconventional backgrounds with key complementary traits and high potential

solution_framework.output: Instead of vague requests, hiring managers give HR specific candidate profiles with exact traits, backgrounds, and keywords

scientific_foundation: Group Dynamics (Kurt Lewin) - teams function differently than individuals
Belbin's Team Roles - balance of Coordinator, Implementer, Innovator roles
Tuckman's Stages - Forming, Storming, Norming, Performing, Adjourning
Psychological Safety (Amy Edmondson) - high-performing teams feel safe to speak up
Big Five (OCEAN) personality framework - evidence-based collaboration prediction
Diversity & Cognitive Complementarity - diverse skills strengthen teams

key_innovations.team_chemistry_modeling: Predictive compatibility engine showing how personality combinations perform together
key_innovations.three_profile_blueprint: Structured spectrum approach promoting diversity while working with existing ATS systems
key_innovations.hr_translation_engine: Auto-generate boolean search strings, red flag profiles, and interview question banks
key_innovations.situation_intelligence: Context-aware recommendations based on company phase, project type, industry
key_innovations.risk_mitigation: Proactive identification of team composition risks and succession planning gaps
key_innovations.continuous_learning: Post-hire tracking and optimization based on success/failure patterns

competitive_advantages: Works with existing ATS systems - no organizational change required
Promotes diversity through structured spectrum approach
Focuses on team gaps rather than just individual qualifications
Provides explainable AI recommendations for HR confidence
Shifts power dynamics constructively - hiring managers become strategic architects
Creates win-win-win: better strategy, clearer HR direction, improved diversity

market_validation.competitive_landscape: No existing tools target hiring managers specifically for team composition analysis
market_validation.blue_ocean_opportunity: New category: 'Hiring Manager Intelligence Tools' - democratizing strategic consulting
market_validation.market_gap: Existing solutions are either HR-centric or post-hire focused, nothing bridges team building with pre-hire planning

entry_points: One-Click Team Snapshot - upload LinkedIn profiles, get instant analysis in 30 seconds
Fix My Last Bad Hire - start with analyzing what went wrong
Viral Internal Demo - start with one progressive manager, let results speak
Results in Your Next Hire Promise - focus on immediate improvement
design_principles: Zero behavior change - results look like what managers already give HR
Immediate utility focus - start with 'HR Request Generator'
Beta tester positioning - frame early users as industry pioneers

value_proposition_enhancements.team_simulation_mode: Test drive how different candidate profiles would change team dynamics before hiring
value_proposition_enhancements.predictive_compatibility: Shows specific outcomes like 'Adding Profile A reduces creativity by 15% but increases execution by 30%'
value_proposition_enhancements.context_awareness: Adapts recommendations based on company phase, project phase, industry culture
value_proposition_enhancements.reverse_engineering: Competitive intelligence analyzing successful team compositions in similar companies

impact_metrics.financial: Bad hires cost 2.5x annual salary in turnover/productivity loss
impact_metrics.operational: Reduced time-to-fill while good candidates get hired elsewhere
impact_metrics.team: Prevents team dysfunction when new hires don't mesh
success_indicators: Increased hiring manager satisfaction with initial candidate slate
Decreased time-to-hire for positions using the tool

design_sprint_brief.challenge_question: How might we enable hiring managers to translate team dynamics into actionable search criteria that HR can execute?
design_sprint_brief.target_user: Mid-to-senior level hiring managers who experience frustration with HR-sourced candidates
design_sprint_brief.key_constraint: Must work within existing HR processes - no system changes required
design_sprint_brief.test_scenario: Test with real hiring managers using actual open positions to measure quality of candidate matches

exploration_journey.phase_1: Initial curiosity about team building science and AI personality analysis
exploration_journey.phase_2: Framework development mapping personality traits to functional team roles
exploration_journey.phase_3: Technical exploration of LinkedIn API (found highly restricted)
exploration_journey.phase_4: Critical examination of diversity problems in modern ATS filtering
exploration_journey.phase_6: Practical mockup with UX Designer hiring example
exploration_journey.phase_7: Market reality check - competitive landscape analysis

open_questions: How to demonstrate value before users commit to trying the platform?
What's the optimal balance between AI automation and human insight?
How to measure and prove improved hiring outcomes?
What partnerships with existing HR tech could accelerate adoption?
How to scale from individual hiring decisions to organizational culture transformation?
next_steps: Pilot test three-profile system with willing hiring managers
Research legal compliance requirements for recruitment AI
Industry benchmarking for team composition success patterns
User journey mapping for hiring manager frustration points
trustybits_project.strategic_positioning: Tool represents evolution from tactical CV tools to strategic hiring manager empowerment platform. Works within existing systems rather than replacing them, maintaining HR workflows while dramatically improving input quality.
trustybits_project.justin_role: Product Strategist, UX Designer, Market Researcher - Led ideation, competitive analysis, framework development, and design sprint planning

extraction_notes.methodology: Automated file discovery and JSON extraction from available summaries
extraction_notes.completeness: High-level overview complete. Detailed resume content requires manual extraction from DOCX/PDF files.
next_steps: Extract specific achievements from resume bullets files
Parse detailed work history from PDF resumes

usage_instructions.for_job_applications: Reference appropriate resume variant and pull relevant achievements from this library
usage_instructions.for_portfolio: Use work_samples_by_category to locate relevant project files
usage_instructions.for_interviews: Review achievements_and_proof_points and innovation_projects for talking points
usage_instructions.for_networking: Use professional_experience and innovation_projects to articulate value proposition

sections.summary: Product Manager with a strong foundation in user -centered design, market research, and cross -functional collaboration, supported by a UX management certification.  Skilled at leveraging user insights and market trends to develop and execute product strategies that align with business products that meet user and mar ket needs. EMPLOYMENT HISTORY Product Manager  2015 - Present Hammer Consulting & Support Services  Dallas, TX • Drove operational efficiency and cost savings  by designing and implementing automated workflows on a B2B SaaS platform, cutting manual tasks by 55% and reducing seasonal staff reliance by 65%. • Aligned user needs with business goals  by leading cross -functional collaboration among development teams, clients, and stakeholders, resulting in successful project outcomes and improved product performance . • Resolved critical user pain points  through in -depth research and analysis, transforming insights into actionable design strategies that improved workflows and elevated user satisfaction . • Enhanced stakeholder engagement  by creating and presenting intuitive UI prototypes using Figma and Adobe XD, effectively communicating innovative product features that drove client buy -in. • Spearheaded the delivery of new features  for online statement processing tools, increasing usability, accessibility , and operational efficiency for end-users . • Led a comprehensive website redesign initiative  for a non -profit division, conducting user research and overseeing wireframing and prototyping to deliver scalable, user -driven solutions aligned with organizational goals . Managing Partner & Design Lead          2018 - 2024 prtcl inc  Dallas, TX  & Brooklyn, NY • Drove sales growth by 10 –26% across multiple brands  by leveraging market research and user insights to craft innovative, user -centered product strategies that directly impacted revenue . • Unified cross -functional teams and stakeholders  to deliver seamless product solutions, aligning design efforts with user needs and business • Uncovered and resolved critical user pain points  by conducting detailed research and analysis, developing actionable proposals that improved user satisfaction and product adoption . • Led cross -functional teams to execute high -impact product launches,  balancing competing priorities to deliver innovative solutions aligned with business goals . • Boosted revenue growth and sustained market leadership  by strategically analyzing trends and user behaviors, positioning products for long - term success in competitive markets . • Transformed user feedback and market insights into actionable product enhancements,  driving improvements that exceeded customer expectations and strengthened brand loyalty . Eyewear Design Director  2015 - 2018 Costa Del Mar  Dallas, TX & Daytona Beach, FL • Resolved product defects and reduced customer complaints  by leading cross -functional collaboration with engineering, QA, and stakeholders, • Delivered $10 million in revenue growth  by leading the launch of a new Nike Vision product line targeting younger consumers, leveraging research insights to secure stakeholder buy -in and drive 10% of the company’s annual growth in its first year .
